list.title: Tanadin ƙungiyarka
list.description: Tanadi mai juyawa tare da mutanen da ka amince da su. Kowane zagaye ana riƙe shi da kwangilar on-chain, ba mutum ba.
list.emptyHint: Gayyaci abokai ko dangi ka kuma saita gudummawarka

info.susu: Yadda Susu ke aiki: kowa yana ba da kuɗi ƙayyadadde kowane zagaye. A cikin da'irar juyawa, memba ɗaya yana karɓar dukan tulu kowane zagaye har sai kowa ya sami damarsa. A cikin da'irar tarawa, kowa yana tanadi cikin tulu ɗaya na gama-gari sannan ya karɓi tanadinsa a ƙarshe. Komai ana iya tabbatar da shi a kan Monad.

rotation.title: Juyawa
rotation.description: Ku yi ta juyawa. Kowa yana biya kowane zagaye, kuma memba ɗaya yana karɓar dukan tulu har sai kowa ya sami damarsa.

accumulation.title: Tarawa
accumulation.description: Ku yi tanadi tare. Kowa yana biya cikin tulu ɗaya na gama-gari sannan ya karɓi tanadinsa a ƙarshe.

targetPayout.label: Adadin biyan da ake nufi ga kowane mutum (USDC)
targetPayout.hint: Abin da kowane memba ke karɓa lokacin da ya kai damarsa.

emails.label: Imel na membobi
emails.hintRotation: (gayyaci har zuwa {{count}}, a raba da waƙafi)
emails.tooManyRotation: Gayyata sun yi yawa. Da'ira ta {{size}} tana da wuri ga {{count}} ban da kai.
emails.tooManyAccumulation: Membobi sun yi yawa. Da'ira za ta iya ƙunsar mutane 20 kawai (kai + gayyatattu 19).

summary.rotationDetail: Kowane memba na {{count}} yana biyan {{base}} na asali + {{fee}} na caji (2%). Lokacin da ka kai damarka kana karɓar {{payout}}. Da'irar tana farawa kai tsaye da zarar kowa ya shiga.
summary.accumulationDetail: Tanadinka za a mayar maka bayan zagaye {{count}}.

image.label: Hoton da'ira (na zaɓi)
image.hint: A matsayinka na shugaban da'ira, ƙara hoto don haɗa ƙungiyarka kan burin.

card.joinedProgress: {{joined}} daga {{target}} sun shiga · yana farawa kai tsaye idan ya cika

detail.notFound: Ba mu sami wannan da'irar ba.
detail.contributedThisRound: An ba da gudummawa a wannan zagaye
detail.notStarted: Wannan da'irar ba ta fara ba tukuna

build.title: Gina da'irarka
build.descAccumulation: Gayyaci mutane ta imel. Kowa yana tanadi cikin tulu ɗaya na gama-gari na zagaye {{count}}, sannan ya karɓi tanadinsa. Fara da'irar da zarar kowa ya shiga.
build.descTargeted: Gayyaci mutane ta imel. {{joined}} daga {{target}} sun shiga. Da'irar tana farawa kai tsaye da zarar mutum na ƙarshe ya shiga.
build.descRotation: Gayyaci mutane ta imel. Zagaye sun yi daidai da membobi, don haka kowa yana samun biya guda ɗaya. Fara da'irar da zarar kowa ya shiga.
build.needMore: Gayyaci aƙalla memba ɗaya kuma don fara da'irar.

delete.title: Share da'ira
delete.description: Babu wani da ya shiga tukuna, don haka za ka iya share wannan da'irar. Da zarar wani memba ya shiga, ba za a iya share ta ba. Wannan yana cire da'irar da duk gayyatonin da ke jira har abada.

schedule.descAccumulation: Kowa yana tanadi cikin tulu ɗaya na gama-gari. Bayan zagaye {{count}}, kowane memba yana karɓar tanadinsa, wanda aka kulle a on-chain.
schedule.descRotation: An kulle juyawar a on-chain, don haka kowa ya san wa zai karɓi tulu, da kuma yaushe.

escrow.title: Ajiya ta on-chain
escrow.description: Gudummawa suna zama cikin wannan ajiyar Susu a kan Monad. Ana ɗaukar cajin yarjejeniya na {{fee}}% daga kowace biya.

toast.streakDescription: Kyau, wannan gudummawar tana ƙidaya cikin jerin tanadinka.

privy.selfCustody: Walat ɗinka na kanka ne. Haɗa shi don ka rattaba hannu kan gudummawar da kanka.
privy.connect: Haɗa walat don ba da gudummawa
privy.notAvailable: Gudummawar on-chain ba ta samuwa a wannan tsarin.
privy.failed: Gudummawa ta gaza. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
